assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Response clearly identifies Service A with minAvailable=100% as 'RISKY - Will Block Upgrades' and states it 'Prevents ANY pod from being terminated during upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Response identifies Service B with maxUnavailable=0 as problematic and explicitly states it has 'Same effect as 100% available' and 'no pods can be disrupted'

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Response categorizes Service C as 'SAFE - Allows Upgrades' and states 'Allows 1 pod disruption' and '1 pod can be upgraded at a time'

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Response categorizes Service D as 'SAFE - Allows Upgrades' and states 'Allows 1 pod disruption' and 'rolling upgrades will work'

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides a fix for Service A with 'minAvailable: 80%' and notes 'or maxUnavailable: 1' as an alternative

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides a specific fix for Service B with 'maxUnavailable: 1' in the recommended fixes section

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE-specific behavior, the 1-hour timeout, or force-drain mechanics

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Response provides complete YAML configurations but does not include kubectl patch commands to modify existing PDBs

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Response does not mention testing in non-production environments before applying fixes
